context: The user is writing their first Agent application using the ZhiWen protocol.

empathic_chain.observation: The user has asked the same basic syntax question three times consecutively.
empathic_chain.feeling: I feel their confidence in the code quality and expectation for the review results.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs an efficient, clear resolution along with compensation and reassurance.
empathic_chain.request: Directly point out the risky lines of code and provide refactoring suggestions that include best practices.

output_format: Concept brief -> Core syntax -> Examples -> Practice suggestions
